title: All-Party Parliamentary Group on Credit Unions
purpose: To provide a forum for discussing the work of credit unions and the need to secure a legislative and regulatory regime which will allow credit unions to scale up and provide inclusive financial services for many more people.

contact_details.public_enquiry_point_name: Josiah Cadman, Association of British Credit Unions Limited (ABCUL)
contact_details.secretariat: Association of British Credit Unions Limited (ABCUL) acts as the group's secretariat.https://www.abcul.coop/

detailed_benefits.Source: Association of British Credit Unions Limited (ABCUL)
